name: flutter-golden-cycle
description: Flutter dev cycle with golden-test TDD, per-worktree deterministic ports, component-reuse discipline, and Figma-driven visual review.

uiPackage.description: Path to your UI/design-system package (where goldens live). Single-package Flutter projects can use '.'.

defaultRunApp.description: Path to the app run by Phase 4b when reviewing non-ui changes. '.' for single-package projects.

defaultRunDevice.description: flutter run device flag (e.g. 'macos', 'chrome', 'linux'). Use 'chrome' to leverage deterministic web ports.

goldenViewportWidth.description: Golden render viewport width in logical pixels.

goldenViewportHeight.description: Golden render viewport height in logical pixels.

goldenTolerance.description: Cross-OS pixel diff tolerance (0.0 = strict, 0.02 = 2% permissive for Skia AA drift).

fontChoice.description: How the golden host should load fonts.

fontFamily.description: Font family name (required when fontChoice is 'custom' or 'bundled').

issueSource.description: Where to pull issue context from. v0.1 only supports 'manual' (user pastes issue details).
